description_long: This is a large, rectangular corrugated cardboard box with a natural brown color and a matte finish. The front and back faces display the red text 'NOVAPAK Sistemas de empaque y embalaje', indicating it is a packaging or shipping box from the Novapak brand. The top flaps are partially closed, with a visible seam running down the center, suggesting the box is not fully sealed. The surface shows a slightly rough texture typical of cardboard, with small speckles and imperfections. The box appears empty or lightly filled, as there is no visible bulging or deformation. Its size and construction make it suitable for transporting or storing medium to large items in urban environments.
description: A large brown corrugated cardboard box with red 'NOVAPAK' branding and partially closed top flaps, showing a rough, matte surface.
description_view_0: Front view showing the 'NOVAPAK Sistemas de empaque y embalaje' branding clearly on the box's face.
description_view_1: Side view with the top flaps visible and a central seam, no branding visible.
description_view_2: Back view, nearly identical to the front, with the same 'NOVAPAK' branding visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, showing the top flaps and seam, no branding visible.
attribute_storefront_signage: NOVAPAK Sistemas de empaque y embalaje
